_meta.name: all
_meta.purpose: Combined router: matches on prompt substrings to route each diagnose call to the appropriate canned category response. Use this for end-to-end tests that exercise multiple failure paths in one run. Each entry corresponds to a standalone fixture file in this directory.
_meta.matching_order: matchOn entries are tried IN DECLARATION ORDER. The first hit wins, so more specific matches must come before broader ones.
_meta.matching_note: The user message in the prompt is JSON.stringify(bundle) where bundle is a DiagnoseInput. It includes error_class, error_message, step_text. It does NOT include the rules-based classifier name (e.g. LOCATOR_NOT_FOUND) — classifier signals go via the `prior` argument, NOT into the prompt body. Match on substrings of error_class / error_message / step_text instead.

output.human_explanation: Selector attribute drifted (data-testid → data-test-id). Element present; rebind only.
evidence: Sibling scenario bound via role text passed
